case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF VS. ANTHONY ODILI

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,006.00 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF (SAN FRANCISCO) AS TO DEFENDANT ODILI, ANTHONY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-11-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-13-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY TONY S. MIGUEL, JR.--SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2014 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-13-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-25-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH A. QUARTELL-COLLECTIONS SUPERVISOR. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF (SAN FRANCISCO) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ODILI, ANTHONY $836.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $866.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $30.50) SERVED NOV-09-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ODILI, ANTHONY
